text.title: AI Overview Monitoring Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether ai-overview-monitoring applies. Root question is a concrete observable; branches name a specific input pattern (`when`) and conclude with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the priority query list ≥10 queries with ≥30 days of retrofit AND the monitoring stack working?

branch.when: yes AND only one source covered
yes AND findings lack action mapping

example.description: When the root condition holds and the first matching branch fires, the tree concludes with the referenced rule id — meaning the methodology applies via that rule. The agent loads the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follows it. When the root condition does not hold, the tree concludes with `skip-methodology`.
